<!-- Page Type: Landingpage -->
<!-- Generated by SEOwlsClaw v0.1 | SEO with Owls Claw (See Owls Claw) -->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{TITLE} — {DESCRIPTION}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="{DESCRIPTION_LENGTH_160_chars_max}">
    <link rel="canonical" href="{URL_CANONICAL}">
    
    <!-- Schema: Event or Organization Sale -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "{SCHEMA_TYPE}",
      "name": "{TITLE}",
      "description": "{DESCRIPTION}",
      "startDate": "{START_DATE_FORMATTED}",
      "endDate": "{END_DATE_FORMATTED}",
      "offers": {
        "@type": "Offer",
        "priceCurrency": "EUR",
        "price": "{PRICE_CURRENCY_PRICE}",
        "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock"
      }
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- HERO SECTION -->
    <header class="hero-section">
        <h1>{H1_TITLE} — {PRIMARY_KEYWORD}</h1>
        <p>{HERO_SUBHEADLINE_URGENCY} — Only {SCARCITY_COUNT} left!</p>
        <a href="#cta" class="cta-button">Get Started Now</a>
    </header>

    <!-- VALUE PROPOSITION H2 -->
    <section class="value-prop">
        <h2>{H2_VALUE_PROP_TITLE}</h2>
        <p>{VALUE_CONTENT_300_CHARS_MAX}</p>
    </section>

    <!-- FEATURES SECTION H3s -->
    <section class="features">
        <h3>{H3_FEATURES_TITLE}</h3>
        <ul>
            <li>{LIST_ITEM_1_BENEFITS}</li>
            <li>{LIST_ITEM_2_LIMITED_OFFER}</li>
            <li>{LIST_ITEM_3_EXCLUSIVE_DEAL}</li>
        </ul>
    </section>

    <!-- SOCIAL PROOF H4s -->
    <section class="social-proof">
        <h4>{H4_TESTIMONIAL_TITLE}</h4>
        <blockquote>"{TESTIMONIAL_QUOTE} — {TESTIMONIAL_NAME}"</blockquote>
    </section>

    <!-- MAIN CTA H5 Section -->
    <section id="cta" class="cta-section">
        <h5>{H5_FINAL_CTA_TITLE}</h5>
        <p>{FINAL_CTA_BULLET_POINTS}</p>
        <a href="{CTA_LINK}" class="primary-cta-button">{BUTTON_TEXT_LIMITED_STOCK}</a>
    </section>

    <!-- INTERNAL LINKING H6s -->
    <footer class="internal-links">
        <h6><a href="/related-product-page">{RELATED_PAGE_TITLE}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="/faq-about-offer">{FAQ_SECTION_TITLE}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="/privacy-policy">{POLICY_LINK}</a></h6>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

<!-- Editing Guide: Change any {PLACEHOLDER} text directly in this file before generation -->
<!-- Example: If you want different H2 structure, edit line 19 and save! -->
